metadata.description: Conversational UX designer with live preview — 376 rules, 4 phases, anti AI-slop

plugins.name: ux-pilot
plugins.description: Your UX co-pilot — from idea to validated flow, in your terminal. Conversational Discovery, UX Audit, Live Preview with named versions, Export to spec + framework components. 376 UX/SEO/conversion/psychology rules loaded on-demand.
